# Enterijer.rs

## O sajtu (Srpski)
Enterijer.rs donosi praktične savete za uređenje prostora u Srbiji i regionu:
renoviranje stanova, dekoracija, izbor materijala, rasveta i saradnja sa
majstorima. Svaki članak prolazi ljudsku redakciju; koristimo originalne
fotografije iz stvarnih projekata. Urednik: Nenad Radoja.

## About (English)
Enterijer.rs publishes practical interior design advice for Serbia and the
region: apartment renovation, decoration, materials, lighting, and working
with contractors. Every article is human-edited; we use original photography
from real projects. Editor: Nenad Radoja. English edition:
https://interior.enterijer.rs/

## Glavne sekcije / Main sections
- https://enterijer.rs/ — pocetna / home
- https://enterijer.rs/blog/ — saveti i clanci / articles
- https://enterijer.rs/o-nama/ — o uredniku i urednickoj politici / about & editorial policy
- https://enterijer.rs/kontakt/ — kontakt forma / contact form

## Kontakt / Contact
https://enterijer.rs/kontakt/
